result.summary: The page is generally readable, but several elements look clipped or overcrowded on the mobile viewport. The most noticeable problems are horizontal overflow in the navigation/game rows and the fixed bottom navigation covering content near the bottom.

issues.description: Several horizontal sections are clipped at the right edge. The top category tab shows truncated text like “Hot Ga…”, and game cards in the right column are only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive layout so cards/tabs fit the viewport, or make the horizontal carousel behavior clearer with proper spacing, snap points, and visual affordances.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content at the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of game cards.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the page content equal to the height of the fixed bottom nav.

issues.description: The carousel/banner arrows sit very close to the screen edges and look partially cramped, especially the right arrow.
issues.suggestion: Inset the carousel controls slightly or reduce their size on mobile so they do not feel clipped.

issues.description: The header area is visually crowded with multiple logos, the Pennsylvania label, and the Join Now button packed into a small height.
issues.suggestion: Increase spacing, reduce logo sizes, or simplify the mobile header to improve visual balance.
